rulings.Case Title: IN RE THE MATTER OF THE GLENN AND ELSA LERNER TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Beneficiaries|Petitioners Notice Of Motion And Motion To Sanction Respondent Glenn Lerner For Failing To Comply With The Courts Order Granting Motion To Compel Production Of Documents
rulings.Rulings: Salter and Segal's Motion to Sanction Lerner is denied. Prevailing party to prepare order. Any party who contests the tentative and requests to argue the matter must notify the court (415-551-3702 and opposing counsel by 5:00 p.m. on 9/11/2013.

rulings.Case Title: IN RE THE MATTER OF THE GLENN AND ELSA LERNER TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Respondent Glenn Lerners Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Responses To Requests For Admission, Set 2 (Motion #3)
rulings.Rulings: Lerner's Motion to Compel further Responses to Requests for Admission is granted as to 44, 45, 46, 47, 53, 54, 58, 60, 61, 62, 63, 70, 72, 73, 74, 75, 76, 77, 78, 79, 80, 81, 86, and 87 and denied as to the remainder. Thirty days from 9/12/2013 to respond. Any party who contests the tentative and requests to argue the matter must notify the court (415-551-3702) and opposing counsel by 5:00 p.m. on 9/11/2013.

rulings.Case Title: IN RE THE MATTER OF THE GLENN AND ELSA LERNER TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Respondent Glenn Lerners Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Responses To Special Interrogatories, Set 2 (Motion #2)
rulings.Rulings: Lerner's Motion to Compel Further Responses to Special Interrogatories, Set 2 is denied. Any party who contests the tentative and requests to argue the matter must contact the court (415-551-3702) and opposing counsel by 5:00 p.m. on 9/11/2013.

rulings.Case Title: IN RE THE MATTER OF THE GLENN AND ELSA LERNER TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Respondent Glenn Lerners Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Responses To Form Interrogatories, Set 2 (Motion #1)
rulings.Rulings: Lerner's Motion to Compel Further Answers to Form Interrogatories, Set 2 is denied. Any party who contests the tentative and requests to argue the matter must contact the court (415-551-3702) and opposing counsel by 5:00 p.m. on 9/11/2013.
